title: leucanthemum montanum subsp. delarbrei
intro: Leucanthemum montanum subsp. delarbrei, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate cold and flu symptoms due to its antimicrobial properties. Leucanthemum montanum subsp. delarbrei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and is often combined with other herbs for enhanced effects.
